summary: C07 Backup module: SQLite copy + JSON export per table + Git commit/push to backup/auto branch. Dry-run always produces artifacts. 26 tests passing.

files.description: Package exports: BackupConfig, BackupResult, run_backup, export_json, copy_sqlite, git_commit_push, is_git_configured
Main backup module with CLI. Supports --dry-run, --db-path, --backup-dir, --remote. Exports tables as JSON (base64 for binary), copies SQLite, commits to backup/auto branch.
26 tests covering: dry-run, SQLite copy, JSON export, Git detection, CLI, error handling
Full documentation: CLI usage, env vars, cron examples, programmatic API, security notes

implementation_notes.Q1_db_path: Configurable via EURKAI_DB_PATH env, default data/cockpit.db
implementation_notes.Q2_json_format: One file per table, binary as base64, always exported
implementation_notes.Q3_backup_dir: Configurable via EURKAI_BACKUP_DIR or CLI, default data/backups/<timestamp>
implementation_notes.Q4_git: Remote configurable (default origin), branch backup/auto, commit format: backup(db): <ISO8601>
implementation_notes.Q5_cron: Autonomous script, cron examples in docs/BACKUP.md
implementation_notes.Q6_storage: Imports Storage from C02 when available, records to backups table
implementation_notes.Q7_backups_table: Uses existing table, UUID for id, records status/commit_sha/notes
